description: Adding sweep quality filters on top of losing base may create statistical artifact
mitigation: Pre-commit thresholds. Kill if TRAIN PF<1.0. Max 150 configs. Stratified sampling.

description: V7 engine inherited from M3. Hidden bugs propagate silently.
mitigation: Run full suite before and after. Verify EOM=0 in metrics. Independent verify mandatory.

description: After 3 RED iterations pressure to find positive results leads to relaxed criteria.
mitigation: Immutable pre-commitment. No post-hoc parameter changes. No label changes after seeing data.

description: Sweep quality features computed using future price information.
mitigation: Sweep depth uses only closed bars at T. Displacement uses only bars after sweep. Causal tests mandatory.

description: Testing multiple level types and thresholds inflates false positive rate.
mitigation: Bonferroni-aware interpretation. Require consistency across TRAIN and VAL simultaneously.

description: Quality gates may reduce N below statistical significance.
mitigation: Pre-committed minimum N_val>=40. If not met: INCONCLUSIVE not GREEN.

description: Displacement thresholds tuned to match winning trades post-hoc.
mitigation: 3 discrete pre-committed thresholds only. No continuous optimization. No adding thresholds after seeing results.

description: Missing calendar data for recent months creates silent signal leakage.
mitigation: Fail-close enforcement. Gap>5 business days = abort.
